summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fractal Platform - ALL systems working perfectly. Backend APIs (9/9 passed), Frontend pages fully functional, Lifecycle system active, Admin panel accessible.
passed_tests: Backend Health API - TypeScript backend running in FRACTAL_ONLY mode
BTC Fractal API - 30d focus-pack working with verdicts and forecasts
SPX Fractal API - 30d horizon with expected returns and confidence
DXY Terminal API - 30d focus with verdict and series data
Overview APIs - All assets (BTC/SPX/DXY) returning correct data ranges
Case-insensitive asset validation - Both uppercase and lowercase work
Lifecycle API - BTC version management active (v20260302.190555.999)
Model Config API - BTC parameters configurable (windowLen: 60, topK: 25)
BTC Fractal page (/) - Shows forecast, Expected Outcomes, Risk & Position
SPX Fractal page (/fractal/spx) - BULLISH verdict available, Cross-Asset mode
DXY Terminal (/dxy) - BEARISH USD verdict (-5.77%), Macro overlay working
Admin Panel (/admin) - Login page with proper authentication form
Overview page (/overview) - Market Overview with BTC/SPX/DXY tabs functional

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all 5 required pages functional with proper content)
